Metadata.descripcion: Discover the heritage sites of Huamanga, Ayacucho: churches, viewpoints, museums, cultural agenda and more.

Home.subtitulo: Colonial churches, viewpoints, retablos and Ayacucho's living cultural agenda — all in one place.
Home.seccionDiferenciador: What can I do today, right now, right here?
Home.textoDiferenciador: Recommendations based on the time, the weather and what is open right now.

Lugares.resultados: {total, plural, =0 {No results} one {# place} other {# places}}
Lugares.sinResultados: We couldn't find places matching your search. Try something else.
Lugares.errorUbicacion: We couldn't get your location. Check your browser permissions.
Lugares.errorCargaTexto: The server did not respond. This is usually temporary — try again in a few seconds.
Lugares.sinResenas: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your visit!
Lugares.iniciaSesionParaResenar: Sign in to write a review →
Lugares.resenaEnviada: Thanks! Your review has been published.
Lugares.eligeCalificacion: Pick a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
Lugares.errorResena: Could not publish your review. Please try again.

Mapa.subtitulo: Explore places by category; tap a point to see its page.
Mapa.sinKey: Demo base map — set NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPTILER_KEY for the full 3D map

Recomendaciones.titulo: What can I do right now?

Cuenta.subtitulo: Sign in to review places, upload photos and save favorites.
Cuenta.passwordAyuda: At least 8 characters, with one letter and one number.
Cuenta.errorGenerico: Could not complete the request. Please try again.

Reportar.subtitulo: Help preserve Huamanga. Your report reaches the authorities in under a minute — no account needed.
Reportar.describeMas: Please describe the incident in a bit more detail.
Reportar.ayudaPin: Tap the map or drag the pin to mark the exact spot.
Reportar.privacidad: Your privacy is protected: we never store your IP address or your location — only the incident location.
Reportar.errorEnvio: Could not send the report. Please try again.
Reportar.graciasTexto: Your report was received and will be reviewed by the team. Once approved it will appear on the public incidents map.

MapaIncidentes.sinIncidentes: No approved incidents on the map yet.

Eventos.subtitulo: Festivities, fairs and concerts that bring Huamanga to life all year round.
Eventos.sinEventos: No events of this type for now.
Eventos.enDias: in {dias, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
Eventos.duranteMiVisitaAyuda: Enter your travel dates and discover which events match your stay.
Eventos.sinEventosEnFechas: No events on those dates. There is still plenty to discover!
Eventos.recurrente: This event takes place every year.

Negocios.subtitulo: Verified local restaurants, lodging and artisans. Contact them directly on WhatsApp.
Negocios.sinNegocios: No businesses in this category yet. Be the first to register yours!
Negocios.mensajeWhatsApp: Hi! I found you on Huamanga Tourism and would like more information.
Negocios.miNegocioAyuda: Register your business to appear in the directory. An administrator will review it before publishing.
Negocios.iniciaSesionParaRegistrar: Sign in to register your business →
Negocios.registrado: Registered! Your business is pending approval.
Negocios.errorGuardar: Could not save. Check the data and try again.

estados.APROBADO: ✓ Your business is published in the directory.
estados.RECHAZADO: ✕ Your registration was rejected. Fix the data and save to resubmit.
estados.SUSPENDIDO: ⚠ Your business was suspended. Contact the administrator.
